_note: Feature scope with one new capability (Added) and one bug fix (Fixed) — both sections must appear, correctly classified

feature.title: Settlement export and duplicate prevention
feature.body:
## Goal
Merchants can download their settlement data for offline reconciliation, and the system prevents duplicate settlement records from being created.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Merchants can export the settlement list as a CSV file
- Duplicate settlements are rejected at ingestion time with a clear error
- Existing settlements are not affected by the duplicate check

tasks.title: Add CSV export button to settlement list
tasks.body:
## Functional Description
Allow merchants to download their current settlement list as a CSV file for use in external reconciliation tools.

## Gherkin
```gherkin
Scenario: Merchant exports settlements as CSV
  Given a merchant is viewing the settlement list
  When they click the 'Export CSV' button
  Then a CSV file containing all visible settlements is downloaded to their device
  And the file includes columns for settlement ID, amount, currency, and payout date
```

tasks.title: Reject duplicate settlement on ingestion
tasks.body:
## Functional Description
Prevent duplicate settlement records from being stored when the same settlement is submitted more than once.

## Gherkin
```gherkin
Scenario: Duplicate settlement is rejected
  Given a settlement with reference ID 'STL-9982' already exists
  When the system receives a second ingestion request for settlement 'STL-9982'
  Then the duplicate is rejected and not stored
  And the merchant sees an error indicating the settlement already exists

Scenario: Non-duplicate settlement is accepted
  Given no settlement with reference ID 'STL-9983' exists
  When the system receives an ingestion request for settlement 'STL-9983'
  Then the settlement is stored successfully
  And the merchant sees the new settlement in their list
```
